iree_add_all_subdirs()

    iree::runtime::py::loom::importers::check::check

if(LOOM_IMPORTER_MLIR)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    mlir_test
  SRCS
    "../../../tools/pytest_style_runner.py"
  ARGS
    "loom.importers.check.mlir.runner_test"
  PACKAGE_DIRS
    "${IREE_SOURCE_DIR}/runtime/py"
    "${IREE_BINARY_DIR}/runtime/py"
)

add_custom_command(OUTPUT tests.stamp
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch tests.stamp
  DEPENDS
    "testdata/vector_reduce_amdgpu.mlir"
)

add_custom_target(tests
    DEPENDS tests.stamp
)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    mlir_import_test
  SRCS
    "../import_test.py"
  ARGS
    "mlir"
